html:
A Stinger is an item commonly dropped by a Bee or Killer Bee when killed. It is an ingredient in Sleep Darts.

Stingers can be obtained by either killing Bees or Killer Bees with Weapons, or with the help of other Mobs, or by catching Bees or Killer Bees with a Bug Net then murdering them in the inventory. If the player or any mob attacks a Bee (including catching them with the Bug Net) remaining members of the same Bee Hive (or Bee Box) will emerge as Killer Bees and all members of the hive in the vicinity will target the attacker.

As Stingers are a very common drop from Bees and Killer Bees, they can easily become clutter in vanilla Don't Starve and Reign of Giants, especially given that it is only used for Sleep Darts, and Jet Feathers are tricky to obtain from Crows in the early game and Cut Reeds are dangerous to obtain due to Tentacles lurking in the Marsh. Stingers can also be set on fire to turn them into Ashes.


Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Stingers have a chance to be obtained by harvesting Tumbleweeds.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Stingers can be used to craft Boat Repair Kits.

In the Hamlet DLC, Stingers have a chance to be dropped by Scorpions. They can be used by Wormwood to craft Bramble Traps.

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

Tóm tắt

Stinger là một vật phẩm thường rơi ra từ Ong hoặc Ong Sát Thủ khi bị giết. Nó là một thành phần trong Phi Tiêu Ngủ.

A '''Stinger''' is an item commonly dropped by a [[Bee]] or [[Killer Bee]] when killed. It is an ingredient in [[Sleep Dart]]s.

Stingers can be obtained by either killing Bees or Killer Bees with [[Weapons]], or with the help of other [[Mobs]], or by catching Bees or Killer Bees with a [[Bug Net]] then murdering them in the inventory. If the player or any mob attacks a Bee (including catching them with the Bug Net) remaining members of the same [[Bee Hive]] (or [[Bee Box]]) will emerge as Killer Bees and all members of the hive in the vicinity will target the attacker.

As Stingers are a very common drop from Bees and Killer Bees, they can easily become clutter in vanilla ''[[Don't Starve]]'' and ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]],'' especially given that it is only used for Sleep Darts, and [[Feather|Jet Feathers]] are tricky to obtain from [[Birds|Crows]] in the early game and [[Cut Reeds]] are dangerous to obtain due to [[Tentacle]]s lurking in the [[Marsh]]. Stingers can also be set on fire to turn them into [[Ashes]].

__NOTOC__
=={{pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content==
In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, Stingers have a chance to be obtained by harvesting [[Tumbleweed]]s.

In the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, Stingers can be used to craft [[Boat Repair Kit]]s.

In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, Stingers have a chance to be dropped by [[Scorpion]]s. They can be used by [[Wormwood]] to craft [[Bramble Trap]]s.
